name: xgo
desc: XGo is a programming language that reads like plain English. But it's also incredibly powerful — it lets you leverage assets from C/C++, Go, Python, and JavaSc…
descFull: XGo is a programming language that reads like plain English. But it's also incredibly powerful — it lets you leverage assets from C/C++, Go, Python, and JavaScript/TypeScript, creating a unified software engineering ecosystem. Our vision is to enable everyone to become a builder of the world.
